title: Pulseboard
summary: A production-built analytics console proving responsive Visx SVG measurement, accessible TanStack Table state, measured TanStack Virtual logs, keyboard navigation, and deterministic recovery.

journeys.title: Load a report deep link and preserve responsive, measured SVG geometry across navigation
Navigate the compact console and SVG points by keyboard while overlapping range requests converge
Sort, filter, select, empty, and restore an accessible TanStack campaign report
Window hundreds of measured activity rows and reveal a deterministic off-screen incident
Retry load and refresh failures without hiding retained data, then restore an empty segment

faultScenarios.description: The first deterministic dashboard load fails before report state is applied and succeeds on explicit retry.
The first snapshot refresh fails while the previous analytics remain usable, then succeeds on explicit retry.
The empty scenario renders a no-traffic segment that can restore the full deterministic sample.
Rapid 7-day and 30-day requests complete with different deterministic delays while only the latest choice is applied.
